name: Grade 8 Mathematics — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 8 pathway for geometry, transformations, statistics, and evidence-based mathematical arguments. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 8 knowledge and transferable skills in geometry, transformations, statistics, and evidence-based mathematical arguments.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
